free_text: Measurement and study of (n,p) reaction cross sections
for Cr, Ti, Ni, Co, Zr and Mo isotopes using 14.7 MeV
The neutron generator operated at a voltage of
120 KV and a deuteron beam current of 600 microamperes.
The samples were irradiated at zero degree relative to
Circular foils, one inch in diameter and 0.1 mm thick
and with purity >= 99%, of the natural elements from

Corrections have been made for dead time, coincidence
